description_long: This object consists of a cluster of upright green stems with broad, glossy leaves and two prominent red, cone-shaped inflorescences at the top. The leaves are elliptical, smooth-edged, and arranged alternately along the stems, with a rich green coloration and a waxy surface. The red flower spikes are elongated and densely packed, standing out against the foliage. The stems are slender and appear to be flexible, supporting the weight of the leaves and flowers. There is no visible pot or container, suggesting the plant may be intended for digital placement in a variety of settings. The overall appearance is lush and vibrant, making it suitable for decorative use in urban environments.
description: A lush green plant with broad, glossy leaves and two tall red flower spikes, arranged in a natural cluster. The stems are upright and leafy, with no visible pot.
description_view_0: Two main stems with red flower spikes are visible, with leaves fanning out to the left and right, showing a dense arrangement.
description_view_1: The plant appears fuller, with both red flower spikes clearly visible and leaves overlapping, creating a bushy silhouette.
description_view_2: The leaves are more prominently displayed, with the red flower spikes standing upright and the stems slightly angled apart.
description_view_3: The plant is viewed from the opposite side, showing the backs of the leaves and both flower spikes, with one stem extending outward.
attribute_plant_species: Red Ginger (Alpinia purpurata) or similar tropical flowering plant
